effect.reserved_for: sparing tertiary accent only (never primary CTAs, headlines, or data)
effect.subject: tok_lisraya_color_tertiary_coral

rule_text: Coral (#F26A38) is a sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. [GENERAL] Avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.
intent: Constrain Coral to rare accent use and keep it out of email unless briefed.
summary: Use Coral (#F26A38) sparingly as tertiary accent; never for primary CTAs, headlines, data, or email sections unless specified in brief.
